calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-30-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Penelope Woods appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.
Diane Davis (Decedent's Sister) appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that the petition says that Mr. Pitts was a resident of Marysville when he died, that even though he owned property in San Francisco the petition needs to be filed in the County where he died which is Yuba County, that it is inclined to dismiss the petition without prejudice to it being filed in Yuba County and explained to the parties that the proceedings need to take place in Yuba County. The Petition for Letters of Administration is dismissed without prejudice to either party filing in Yuba County.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.
